Wedding.template:
Hello,

With great happiness, I would like to invite you to join us as we celebrate our wedding. Your presence, love, and blessings will make our special day truly unforgettable.

We would be honored to have you with us.

Warm regards,
Gokul Raj R

Reception.template:
Hello,

As we begin our journey together, we would be delighted to celebrate this joyful occasion with you. Please join us at our wedding reception and share in our happiness.

With warm regards,
Gokul Raj R
